tools.Name: DeepSeek-V3
tools.Description: A strong Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language model with 671B parameters, optimized for efficient inference and cost-effective training.
tools.Use_Case: Advanced natural language processing tasks, reasoning, coding, and mathematical problem-solving at scale.

tools.Name: Maigret
tools.Description: A tool that collects a comprehensive dossier on a person by checking usernames across 3,000+ websites.
tools.Use_Case: Information gathering, digital footprint investigation, and public profile research without needing API keys.

tools.Name: PPT Master
tools.Description: A workflow that uses AI to generate natively editable PowerPoint (.pptx) presentations from documents using real shapes and charts.
tools.Use_Case: Automated professional presentation creation directly from PDFs, DOCX files, or URLs without manual formatting.
